chapter: ENG10_7 – The Tale of Custard the Dragon
title: The Tale of Custard the Dragon – Medium VSAQs

questions.question: What type of house did Belinda live in?
questions.answer: Belinda lived in a little white house.

questions.question: Why did others laugh at Custard?
questions.answer: Because he cried for a safe cage and seemed cowardly.

questions.question: What comparison is used to describe Belinda’s bravery?
questions.answer: She was as brave as a barrel full of bears.

questions.question: How is Mustard described in the poem?
questions.answer: Mustard is described as brave as a tiger in a rage.

questions.question: What did Ink and Blink supposedly do to lions?
questions.answer: They chased lions down the stairs.

questions.question: What does Custard’s appearance suggest about him?
questions.answer: His appearance suggests he is fierce and powerful.

questions.question: Why is Custard’s behaviour ironic?
questions.answer: Because he appears cowardly but proves to be brave.

questions.question: What sound did Mustard make when the pirate appeared?
questions.answer: Mustard growled.

questions.question: What did Ink cry when he saw the pirate?
questions.answer: Ink cried 'Meowch!'

questions.question: What did Belinda do when she saw the pirate?
questions.answer: She turned pale and cried for help.

questions.question: How did Mustard react to the pirate?
questions.answer: He ran away with a terrified yelp.

questions.question: How did Blink react when danger appeared?
questions.answer: Blink hid in a mousehole.

questions.question: How did Custard react to the pirate?
questions.answer: He jumped up and attacked the pirate.

questions.question: What comparison describes Custard attacking the pirate?
questions.answer: Like a robin attacking a worm.

questions.question: What happened when the pirate fired bullets?
questions.answer: The bullets did not hit Custard.

questions.question: How did Custard defeat the pirate?
questions.answer: He gobbled him up.

questions.question: How did Belinda reward Custard after the fight?
questions.answer: She embraced him.

questions.question: What did Mustard do to Custard after the fight?
questions.answer: He licked Custard.

questions.question: What did Ink and Blink do after the pirate was defeated?
questions.answer: They danced around Custard happily.

questions.question: What excuse did Mustard give after the danger passed?
questions.answer: He said he would have been braver if he had not been flustered.

questions.question: What did Ink and Blink claim about their bravery?
questions.answer: They said they would have been three times as brave.

questions.question: What did Custard say about himself after saving everyone?
questions.answer: He said everyone was braver than him.

questions.question: What literary device is used in 'as brave as a tiger in a rage'?
questions.answer: Simile.

questions.question: What quality of Custard is revealed in the poem?
questions.answer: His true bravery.

questions.question: What tone does the poem mainly use?
questions.answer: A humorous tone.
